Uses of Package
de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.notification

  • Packages that use de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.notification 
    Package Description
    de.uka.ilkd.key.gui
    This package contains classes forming the graphical user interface of KeY.
    de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.notification  
    de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.notification.actions  
    de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.notification.events  
  • Classes in de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.notification used by de.uka.ilkd.key.gui 
    Class and Description
    NotificationManager
    The notificatin manager controls the list of active notification tasks.
  • Classes in de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.notification used by de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.notification 
    Class and Description
    NotificationAction
    this interface is implemented by notification actions
    NotificationEventID
    This interface constants used to uniquely identify KeY system events Refactored this type into an enum.
    NotificationManager
    The notificatin manager controls the list of active notification tasks.
    NotificationTask
    A notification task maps a NotificationEvent to a list of actions to be performed when the event is encountered.
  • Classes in de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.notification used by de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.notification.actions 
    Class and Description
    NotificationAction
    this interface is implemented by notification actions
  • Classes in de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.notification used by de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.notification.events 
    Class and Description
    NotificationEventID
    This interface constants used to uniquely identify KeY system events Refactored this type into an enum.
